subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him, the Desired One, worthy and befitting, Who through His gracious favor and Will hath turned unto the guidance of the peoples of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزا که محض عنایت اراده اش بهدایت احزاب عالم توجه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @praise and encouragement, @thankfulness; gratitude, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience
